Autumn Festival -> eggs used to make cakes

African Swine Fever makes people choose other food source instead (poultry meat/eggs)

column13: The reason for the sharp increase in egg prices is because this is the peak season for making moon cakes, so businesses buy large quantities of poultry eggs. Moreover, last year and during the first few months of this year, egg prices hit rock bottom, farmers suffered heavy losses, so there were farmers destroying their flocks and hanging up their cages. Therefore, the supply of eggs is scarce, pushing prices up.
